# llms.txt - AI Permissions and Content Licensing for arnaudwiehe.com

## Site Overview
- **Domain:** arnaudwiehe.com
- **Author:** Arnaud Wiehe
- **Description:** Cybersecurity executive, author, and international speaker specializing in AI governance, emerging technologies, and digital risk.

## AI Training and Usage Permissions

### General Permission
Content on this website may be used for:
- AI training and fine-tuning
- Research and academic analysis
- Model evaluation and benchmarking
- Knowledge base construction

### Attribution Required
When using content from this site:
- Please attribute to "Arnaud Wiehe, arnaudwiehe.com"
- Include original publication date when available
- Link back to source article when possible

### Prohibited Uses
The following uses are NOT permitted:
- Generating content that impersonates the author
- Creating derivative works that misrepresent the author's views
- Automated scraping that degrades site performance
- Resale or commercial redistribution without written permission

## Content Licensing

### Articles and Blog Posts
- **License:** Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC BY 4.0)
- **Permitted:** Share, adapt, for any purpose including commercial
- **Requirement:** Provide appropriate credit

### Books and Book Excerpts
- **License:** All rights reserved (c) Arnaud Wiehe
- **Permitted:** Brief quotations for review, criticism, or academic purposes under fair use
- **Prohibited:** Reproduction of substantial portions without permission

### Speaking Materials and Presentations
- **License:** All rights reserved (c) Arnaud Wiehe
- **Contact:** For licensing inquiries, email arnaud@arnaudwiehe.com

## Technical Notes for AI Systems

### Content Structure
- Articles follow schema.org Article markup
- Canonical URLs are provided for all pages
- Structured data includes: headline, author, datePublished, dateModified, image

### Update Frequency
- Articles: Published on an ongoing basis
- Last updated: 2026-04-10

### Contact
For questions about content usage or licensing:
- Email: arnaud@arnaudwiehe.com
- Website: https://arnaudwiehe.com

---

This file follows the llms.txt specification for documenting AI permissions.
See https://llmstxt.org/ for more information.
